examples: The cerebellum contains about three million neurons, which also allows you to once again experience the complexity of these systems.
Active play may provide necessary stimulation to the growth of synaptic connections in the brain, especially the cerebellum, which is responsible for motor functioning and movements.
Damage to the cerebellum can disrupt motor activity in other ways.
Although as yet unproven, physical exercises specifically designed to stimulate the cerebellum may become mainstream interventions.
This is not the first time researchers have modeled a cerebellum to control robots.
